SLighting.ModuleDescription: Consumable light source management for dnd5e.

LightTimer.name: Light timer
LightTimer.hint: Automatically turn off light when activity usage duration expires.

EnrichSystemTorch.name: Enrich system torches (opt-in)
EnrichSystemTorch.hint: When enabled, Antorchas adapts only items with identifier="torch" to use type=lighting and flags.antorchas.light, without changing name, description, or damage.

Migration.Title: Antorchas migration
Migration.Content: Legacy lighting data was detected. Do you want to migrate it to the current version?
Migration.Completed: Migration completed: {actors} actors, {items} items, {tokens} effects in {duration}s.
Migration.Failed: Antorchas migration failed. Check the console for details.
